mentions.note: Affected by private credit redemptions but rallied; among top 10 S&P performers; market confidence in private equity thesis returning.
Up $7 on recovery; private credit exposure bounce suggests financial stress peak; gains reflect limited systemic damage from credit dislocations.
Aries mentioned as private credit firm exposed to redemption contagion and software portfolio risk; fear-driven market dynamics outweighing fundamentals.

Private equity; small earnings miss, sold −23.3% in Feb on private credit/software fears. Results diverge from peers but sector malaise dominates; may be buying opportunity but private equity sector hated.
